PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

SELECT ?rabbi WHERE {
  ?rabbi wdt:P106 wd:Q133485 .
  ?rabbi rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en" && LCASE(?label) = "rashi")
}
